queries.question: Show me the phone numbers and locations of pop music fans.
queries.sql: SELECT Customers.PhoneNumber, Customers.AddressLine FROM Tickets JOIN Customers ON Tickets.CustomerID = Customers.CustomerID JOIN Concerts ON Concerts.ConcertID = Tickets.ConcertID JOIN Artists  ON Artists.ArtistID = Concerts.HeadlineArtistID WHERE Artists.Genre = 'Pop';
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?phonenumber ?addressline WHERE {
  ?tickets a :Tickets .
  ?customers a :Customers .
  ?tickets p:hasCustomers ?customers .
  ?concerts a :Concert .
  ?tickets p:hasConcerts ?concerts .
  ?artists a :Artist .
  ?concerts p:hasArtists ?artists .
  ?customers p:PhoneNumber ?phonenumber .
  ?customers p:AddressLine ?addressline .
  ?artists p:Genre ?genre_f .
  FILTER(STR(?genre_f) = "Pop")
}
